content: Io ho trovato la frase giapponese strana, ma, dato che è stata scritta da un giapponese, ho pensato che doveva essere corretta.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:I found the Japanese sentence weird, but since it was written by a native, I thought that it was probably correct
